project.name: ShotputForBrainrot
project.description: A colorful arcade physics incremental tycoon built in UEFN with Verse. Throw a ball to reach a Brainrot tier, survive the Giant Brainrot chase home, add the Brainrot to your base for passive income, then upgrade and throw farther.

notes: This descriptor is a human-readable reference for the project. UEFN generates its
own project files (.uefnproject, .uplugin, VerseProject settings) when you create
the project in the editor. Do not rely on this file being read by UEFN.
Recreate the Verse folder layout in-editor as described in Docs/SETUP.md.

editableReferences.ThrowButton: button_device — press to charge / release to throw; also taps to sprint during the chase
editableReferences.ThrowCircleMarker: creative_prop — defines the launch origin (your base / home)
editableReferences.GiantBrainrotProp: creative_prop — the Giant Brainrot shown chasing you during the run home (cosmetic)
